message:
fix(h2,transport): audit connection.rs + aggregator.rs — 5 bugs fixed

h2/connection.rs (3392L):
- HIGH: process_push_promise sent RST_STREAM to parent request stream
  instead of promised stream (RFC 7540 §8.2.2 violation)
- MEDIUM: process_rst_stream missing track_stream_id call, causing
  incorrect GOAWAY last_stream_id (RFC 9113 §6.8)
- MEDIUM: send_stream_window_update sent WINDOW_UPDATE for closed/pruned
  streams, potentially triggering peer protocol errors

transport/aggregator.rs (3730L):
- HIGH: next_expected stuck at u32::MAX due to saturating_add(1) —
  fixed with wrapping_add(1) for correct sequence rollover
- MEDIUM: flush() CAS used Relaxed ordering, allowing concurrent flushes
  and timestamp regression on ARM — fixed with Acquire/Release

74 h2 + 59 aggregator tests pass. Clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
